predicted_caption: Tchõ' tso' kula' ki̱. Mẽ̀ krôrô tso' kàl ki̱. Pàna̱kuö kàl wa tso' të̀ a̱. Kàl tso' shkíshkî a̱. Kàl dur. Ĩ́s síũ.
back_translation: A calabash is on the platform. A round gourd is on the pole. There is a wooden fence in the field. The trees are in the background. The sticks stand. The ground is dry.
target_caption: Kulë’ të́rka̱ kàltak ki̱. Wö́su̱k êk ák të́rka̱ të́shtë̂sh. Kàl wë́rke ta̱î̱.

predicted_caption: Ñã' tso' ũ̀ a̱. Ũ̀ tso' kàl ki̱. Ie'pa ñã' alö̀k. Ũ̀ shkì. Ũ̀ bá. Kàl dalì. Ũ̀ tso' ká̱ kibí a̱.
back_translation: The tamales are in the pot. A pot is on the logs. They cook tamales. The pot is black. The pot is hot. The logs are many. The pot is outdoors.
target_caption: Chkö̀ alírke ù̱ a̱. Bö' ñá̱rke i dikî̱a̱. I pàbatchër sík wa. Bö' tak wa i alêke.

predicted_caption: Wë́mpa dur. Wë́mpa tö kàl tsók. Wë́mpa tso' kãñĩ́k a̱.
back_translation: The men stand. The men hold sticks. The men are in the forest.
target_caption: Ie'pa bák se' shkë́ki ie, Wö́su̱k ie'pa e̱' chö tö irir ká̱ bulu' e̱na̱ ie'pa wö̀ki kò̱s íyi tso' e' wë́rke . Ká̱ i̱â̱i̱â̱ ie'pa bák sè̱nu̱k ká̱ i' ki̱.

predicted_caption: Íyi kàl wa tso' akõ' ki̱. Íyi sulë. Íyi dalì. Íyi dör ák íyi. Tchõ' tso' kula' ki̱. Tchõ' shkì mã̀t. Yë́jkuö tso' akõ' ki̱. Akõ' butûtû.
back_translation: Wooden objects are on the wall. The objects are pretty. The objects are many. The objects are sculptures. Calabashes are on the platform. The calabashes are brown. The pictures are on the wall. The wall is white.
target_caption: Satë i ku̱a̱ki yö'tso ulù klö wa.I ki̱ idiö́köl târule è̱ë E̱na̱ mè̱ wa.

predicted_caption: Pë'pa tso' ñõlõ̀ ki̱. Pë'pa shkö̀k. Pë'pa tö jkö̀ tsók. Pë'pa wa̱ yë́jkuö tso'. Pë'pa tö yë́jkuö tsók. Pë'pa dalì.
back_translation: People are on the road. The people walk. People hold hands. The people have signs. People carry signs. The people are many.
target_caption: Ta̱î̱ pë’ dapàna̱ ká̱ kibí a̱ íyi ujtéchök. Ie’pa a̱ñì̱ wö̀ie i ká̱ ujtéchök.

predicted_caption: Yë́jkuö tso' akõ' ki̱. Yë́jkuö sarûrû. Yë́jkuö tso' yë́jkuö ki̱. Íyiwak tso' yë́jkuö a̱. Tkabë̀ tso' yë́jkuö a̱. Ók tso' yë́jkuö a̱. Sàl tso' yë́jkuö a̱. Dukúr tso' yë́jkuö a̱. Dù tso' yë́jkuö a̱. Nãmũ̀ tso' yë́jkuö a̱.
back_translation: A drawing is on the wall. The drawing is yellow. The text is on the drawing. Animals are in the drawing. A snake is in the drawing. A spider is in the drawing. A monkey is in the drawing. A bat is in the drawing. A bird is in the drawing. A jaguar is in the drawing.
target_caption: Datsi’ tak wö̀a sarûrû, i kí̱ka íyi diö́köl wanyö’tso wè̱s: tkabë̀, sàl, ók, na̱mù̱ e̱na̱ tsawì.

predicted_caption: Ù tso' kãñĩ́k a̱. Ù tã́ĩ. Ù wö́kir shkì mã̀t. Ká̱ ĩ́s dalôlô. Kàl dalì.
back_translation: The house is in the forest. The house is big. The roof is brown. The grass is green. The trees are many.
target_caption: Ù sulë pámi̱k ta̱î̱ ká̱ wë́rke tsipátsipa, wö́su̱k ká̱ í̱te̱ idir.

predicted_caption: Wë́m dur. Wë́m tö apàio apàio tã'. Wë́m tso' ñõlõ̀ ki̱. Ù tso' kapéblo a̱. Ù tã́ĩ. Ák tso' ñõlõ̀ ki̱. Kàl tso' ñõlõ̀ a̱. Kàl tso' ká̱ kibí a̱.
back_translation: The man stands. The man wears clothes. A man is on the path. The houses are in the village. The house is big. The stones are on the path. The poles are at the path. The trees are outdoors.
target_caption: Ù wë́rke bë̂rie élwe. Êköl wë́m yë̂âr ù wö́su̱k. Ie’ kalö̀io dalôlô, pàio sarûrû.
